items.name: Doll body bundle
items.description:
**🩰 Doll Body Bundle (UGC)**
Bring your avatar to life with this cute and stylized doll-inspired body! Perfect for fashion, roleplay, or themed games. Fully compatible with layered clothing and designed for smooth animations.

🎀 Recolorable! You can easily change the skin tone to match your style.
🧸 Great for aesthetic, soft, or doll-themed avatars.
👗 Works perfectly with all layered clothing.

🔗 **Join the group for more bundles like this:**
[MoonsMizz](https://www.roblox.com/communities/35035950/MoonsMizz#!/about)
